title: Route a documentation maintenance task
request: I need to update public docs, verify links, and summarize validation for a small workflow change.

requiredInputs: source-of-truth files such as CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md
outputSignals: keeps the task read-only until an implementation command is chosen
names focused documentation checks before broad maintainer gates
failureSignals: pretends to execute a slash command
recommends editing generated marketplace files by hand

boundaries: does not call Claude Code, Codex, network tools, or marketplace install paths
does not include private consumer names, endpoints, credentials, local paths, or repository addresses
